---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
---

## Problem

<!-- What pain are you trying to solve? Describe the user / dev situation. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What do you suggest we build? Be specific enough that someone could
     start implementing without asking back. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why are they not as good? -->

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Out of scope

<!-- What this issue is explicitly NOT about. Helps reviewers reject scope creep. -->

## Priority

- [ ] P0 — blocks current sprint
- [ ] P1 — next sprint
- [ ] P2 — nice to have
